mapper.select: SELECT id, gym_id, trainer_id, type, type_rep, price FROM MEMBERSHIP WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, gym_id, trainer_id, type, type_rep, price FROM MEMBERSHIP WHERE gym_id = #{gymId}
SELECT id, gym_id, trainer_id, type, type_rep, price FROM MEMBERSHIP WHERE trainer_id = #{trainerId}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO MEMBERSHIP_PT ( member_id, membership_id, gym_id, register_date, start_date, end_date, status, trainer_id, lesson_count ) VALUES ( #{memberId}, #{membershipId},
#{gymId} NULL , #{registerDate}, #{startDate}, #{endDate}, #{status},
#{trainerId} NULL , #{lessonCount} )
mapper.select: SELECT id, member_id, membership_id, gym_id, register_date, start_date, end_date, status, trainer_id, next_session, lesson_count, last_session FROM MEMBERSHIP_PT WHERE member_id = #{memberId} ORDER BY id DESC

SELECT id, member_id, membership_id, gym_id, register_date, start_date, end_date, status, trainer_id, next_session, lesson_count, last_session FROM MEMBERSHIP_PT WHERE member_id = #{memberId} AND status = 'active' ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE MEMBERSHIP_PT SET lesson_count = lesson_count - 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND lesson_count > 0
mapper.select: SELECT id, member_id, membership_id, gym_id, register_date, start_date, end_date, status, trainer_id, next_session, lesson_count, last_session FROM MEMBERSHIP_PT WHERE trainer_id = #{trainerId} ORDER BY id DESC
